title: Material Design 3 — Reference index (link only)
description: Official deep links + short English summaries. Full documentation © Google; visit URLs for specs, motion, and component behavior.

patterns.title: Buttons
patterns.officialSummaryEn: Action triggers with variants (elevated, filled, tonal, outlined, text), sizes, icons, and optional toggle/selection behavior; labels should stay concise.
patterns.harnessHintZh: 操作按钮统一走 BusinessButton / 封装 Button；变体与危险操作与 *.spec.json 对齐，勿混用原生 button 堆样式。

patterns.title: Dialogs
patterns.officialSummaryEn: Modal surfaces for critical choices or required input; should be focused, dismissible per platform guidance, and not hide essential navigation.
patterns.harnessHintZh: 确认/表单模态用封装 Dialog；焦点与 Esc 行为一致；不要在业务页散落多个未托管的模态层。

patterns.title: Menus
patterns.officialSummaryEn: Temporary lists of choices anchored to a control; support selection, icons, and grouping for overflow actions.
patterns.harnessHintZh: 溢出操作用 DropdownMenu / 封装菜单；与工具栏、表格行操作的分工清晰，遵循键盘与焦点规范。

patterns.title: Toolbars
patterns.officialSummaryEn: Surface for frequent actions and controls; can pair with FAB and adapt across window sizes.
patterns.harnessHintZh: 顶栏/工具条内控件仍用 Business 组件拼装；不要在页面层重复多套互不一致的 toolbar 样式。

patterns.title: Split button
patterns.officialSummaryEn: Primary action paired with a connected menu for related secondary actions.
patterns.harnessHintZh: 主操作 + 次要操作菜单：主按钮与菜单项语义拆分；危险操作需二次确认策略。

patterns.title: Button groups
patterns.officialSummaryEn: Related buttons organized together with expressive shape and motion feedback.
patterns.harnessHintZh: 互斥或关联操作成组时保持间距与选中态一致；仍走封装按钮，不用裸 div 模拟。

patterns.title: Progress indicators
patterns.officialSummaryEn: Show ongoing processes (determinate or indeterminate) with clear visual status.
patterns.harnessHintZh: 长耗时用 Progress / Skeleton；与禁用重复提交、空状态文案联动。

patterns.title: Navigation drawer
patterns.officialSummaryEn: Side sheet for app destinations; M3 Expressive recommends expanded navigation rail on many layouts; modal vs standard by window size class.
patterns.harnessHintZh: 侧栏导航与路由壳统一；大屏/折叠设备注意布局分级；新 Expressive 路线可对照 navigation rail 文档。

patterns.title: Navigation rail
patterns.officialSummaryEn: Compact side navigation with icons and optional labels/FAB; preferred evolution over some drawer patterns in M3 Expressive.
patterns.harnessHintZh: 图标导航 + 选中态与主题令牌一致；与全局 header / 内容区留白策略统一。

patterns.title: Color system
patterns.officialSummaryEn: Semantic color roles, dynamic color, and accessible contrast relationships across surfaces and components.
patterns.harnessHintZh: 颜色只用语义 token（Design Token → Tailwind 语义类）；禁止页面硬编码 hex/oklch 与 Carbon/Material 像素级抄色。

patterns.title: Typography
patterns.officialSummaryEn: Type scale, readability, and hierarchy for M3 surfaces and components.
patterns.harnessHintZh: 标题/正文层级与令牌对齐；表格与表单标签字号遵循业务 spec，勿随意局部放大缩小。

patterns.title: Motion
patterns.officialSummaryEn: Transitions and feedback motion; M3 Expressive introduces physics-based motion schemes for more expressive UI.
patterns.harnessHintZh: 动效保持克制、可关闭（尊重系统减少动效）；复杂过渡与业务组件封装策略一致。

patterns.title: Shape
patterns.officialSummaryEn: Corner radii and shape language across components; expressive updates add morphing shapes for buttons and decorative elements.
patterns.harnessHintZh: 圆角与卡片形状走设计令牌；不要在业务 JSX 上随意覆盖 rounded-* 破坏系统一致性。

patterns.title: M3 Expressive (what's new)
patterns.officialSummaryEn: Overview of the expressive update: new/updated components, motion, shape, and how teams adopt the refresh.
patterns.harnessHintZh: 业界演进参考：落地仍以本仓库 Business + spec 为准；可摘取「组合思路」而非照搬 Material Web API。
